Interface INetworkDirections

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to the properties for setting up directions.

[Guid("ACDA7B59-B41F-48B8-A1CE-582FE481053F")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface INetworkDirections

Properties

AbbreviationsTableName

The abbreviatiations table name.

string AbbreviationsTableName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

AttributeMappings

The collection of directions attribute mapping.

IArray AttributeMappings { get; set; }

Property Value

IArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

DefaultOutputLengthUnits

The default length units that will be used for reporting distances in directions.

esriNetworkAttributeUnits DefaultOutputLengthUnits { get; set; }

Property Value

esriNetworkAttributeUnits

Examples

Sample Snippet

LengthAttributeName

The name of the network attribute to be used for reporting travel distances.

string LengthAttributeName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ReferenceLandmarkSources

The array of reference landmark source names.

IStringArray ReferenceLandmarkSources { get; set; }

Property Value

IStringArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

RoadClassAttributeName

The name of the network attribute to be used for road classification.

string RoadClassAttributeName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

RoadSplitsTableName

The name of the table containing the road splits.

string RoadSplitsTableName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

SignpostFeatureClassName

The name of the feature class containing the signposts.

string SignpostFeatureClassName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

SignpostStreetsTableName

The name of the indexed table of signpost street references.

string SignpostStreetsTableName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

SupportsLocalizedStreetNames

The flag that indicates if network has street names translated in multiple languages.

bool SupportsLocalizedStreetNames { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Sample Snippet

TimeAttributeName

The name of the network attribute to be used for reporting travel time.

string TimeAttributeName { get; set; }

string
